messages.error: Something went wrong while sending the message.

hero.title: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our plans
hero.description: We explain everything clearly so you have all the facts before picking your plan.

0.question: Do prices include taxes?
0.answer: No, all listed prices are BEFORE VAT (16%), which is automatically added in the shopping cart. At checkout, you will see the exact breakdown with the base price, VAT, and the final total.

1.question: What is the difference between a VPS and a dedicated server?
1.answer: A VPS (Virtual Private Server) shares physical parts with other users on the same machine, but keeps your own separate virtual setup. A dedicated server gives you a whole physical computer just for you, with no shared resources, ensuring top speed, full control, and 100% of the performance.

2.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
2.answer: Yes, absolutely. All our plans can grow with you. You can increase your resources (RAM, disk space, CPU) whenever your project needs it without downtime. Upgrades are done easily from your dashboard, and you only pay the difference for the time left in your plan.

3.question: Do plans include technical support?
3.answer: Yes, all plans come with expert technical support and continuous monitoring of your service. Our team is ready to help you with server issues, setup, and platform performance. Support is handled via tickets, live chat, and email.

4.question: What payment methods do you accept?
4.answer: Right now we accept Visa and Mastercard credit and debit cards. Payments are safely handled through our secure platform. All services are paid in advance depending on the plan you choose (monthly, quarterly, every six months, or yearly).

5.question: Do you move my site from my old provider for free?
5.answer: Yes, we offer basic moving help at no extra cost for shared hosting and VPS plans. Our team will help move your website, databases, and emails from your current provider. For larger projects or moves to dedicated servers, we will check your case and give you a custom price.

6.question: Do plans include a free SSL certificate?
6.answer: Yes, every single hosting plan includes a free SSL certificate (Let’s Encrypt) that renews on its own. This makes sure your website works safely under secure HTTPS. If you need a premium SSL certificate with higher security checks, we also have paid options.

7.question: How long does technical support take to reply?
7.answer: Our average first reply takes 1 to 2 hours for standard questions and 30 minutes or less for critical emergencies. Support is open 24/7, 365 days a year. Total time to fix a problem depends on how hard it is, but we work to solve most cases in under 24 hours.

8.question: Do you make backups of my files?
8.answer: Yes, we run automatic daily backups of all data stored on our servers. However, these backups are an extra service and do not replace your own responsibility. We highly recommend keeping your own copies of your important content. You can download your backups from your control panel whenever you want.

9.question: Do you have a money-back guarantee?
9.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on new shared hosting and VPS plans. If you are not happy with the service during the first 30 days, you can ask for a full refund. Dedicated servers, domain names, and extra add-ons are not included. Please check our Refund Policy for more details.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Important facts about our hosting setups, setup times, and support choices.

items.q: What type of hosting do you have?
items.a: We offer shared hosting, VPS servers, dedicated machines, and cloud hosting to cover any kind of need.

items.q: Is support available 24 hours a day?
items.a: Yes, our support team is available all the time, 365 days a year, to help you when you need it.

items.q: Is the SSL certificate included for free?
items.a: Yes, all hosting plans include free SSL certificates to protect your users' safety.

items.q: Can I upgrade to a higher plan later?
items.a: Of course, you can easily increase the resources of your plan when your website grows.

items.q: Do you have automatic regular backups?
items.a: Yes, we make scheduled backups to protect your files and ensure a quick recovery if anything happens.

items.q: How fast is the server setup?
items.a: Our systems launch your services instantly so you can set up your website in just a few minutes.
